title: roettlera serrata
intro: Roettlera serrata, also known as Saw Palmetto or Serenoa repens, is a small, shrub-like plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary problems and prostate issues in men. The health benefits of Roettlera serrata include reducing symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), such as enlarged prostate and urinary frequency, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve hair growth. Roettlera serrata can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as a tea or tincture.
